CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_INTRODUCTION: come closer. you want to know about this place, yes? well, listen close.@Me can move around easy, tell you how things are where you're going, help prepare.
CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_RAIN: it soggy down there today, watch out for electric things.
me hear it rain lots today, putting out all the fires down there.
it rain a lot today, be careful of flood water.
CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_ENEMIES: there dangerous things today, be careful.
lots of things come through today, lots of riches too.
CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_CLEAR: everything today good, nobody seem angry.
CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_SHOP: me seen creature selling things today, if only had money.
i saw shop thing down there, you buy me something?
CONDITIONTELLER_DIALOGUE_NOTHING: hello friend, me no see anything today. but maybe you want tell me?
me no see anything today, but maybe you want tell me? me like to listen.
look nice down there, maybe you bring me?
SHOP_DIALOGUE_HELLO: Come come! Step right up! I have the finest wares in the universe! Take a look and see if anything catches your eye!
I've snuck these out of the rift just for you! Take a look and see if anything catches your eye!
Your items are nice and all, but I have something better! Your company's goods can't compare to mine!
I'm glad you're here, I picked these out just for you! Take a look and see if anything catches your eye!
The Sun Corporation can't compete with me! Take a look!
Bloody work out there, but you could do better with my help.
PAD_INTRODEFENCE: Biosphere supression field failure, Attack imminant.
Biosphere at low power, Defend until energy recovery complete.
Biosphere damaged, defend while The Sun Corporation recovers capabilities.
PAD_NO_PATH: Biosphere requires access to enemy approach
PAD_NEW_LIFEFORM: New lifeform detected, adding to databank.
PAD_BOSS_SPAWN: The corporation sends its best wishes.
PAD_INTROPOWERLINE: Damage to powerlines will be reflected in your debt.
Power lines draw enemy ire, do not allow them to be damaged.
Do not allow the powerlines to fall.
PAD_POWERLINE_DESTROYED: Powerline destroyed. Do not allow any more to be damaged.
PAD_PLAYERDEATH: You are expendable, your hardware is not. Do not damage or misplace company property.
The company is relying on your success.
Additional debt has been assigned to your account.
PAD_STORY_FIRSTENABLE: Psychosis Analytics Device active, connection successful, Welcome to the P.A.D network. This PAD is connected to the Sun Corporation and will assist you in your work. Please follow the provided manual and do not damage or misplace company property.
PAD_FIRSTBEEP: PAD has detected an unusual signal. Be aware of increases in beep frequency to avoid damage to unit.
PAD_BIOSPHEREDESTROYED: Biosphere destroyed, Management has been notified.
You have failed your task. Return immediately.
PAD_BIOSPHEREDEFENDEDSUCCESS: Biosphere fully charged. Your mission has succeeded.
Biosphere secured. Move to the next area.
PAD_SUCCESSGENERIC: Task complete. Continue to the next one.
This area is now secure, but more areas need attention.
Elevator access granted. Move to the next area.
PAD_RAREINTROLINES: The company wishes you the best success.
PAD_HIGHTEMP: Temperature conditions unsuitable for human life. Seek shelter.
Unit warrenty void, report to management for corrective action.
